name: Artifacts Builder
description: Build complex, multi-component claude.ai HTML artifacts using a modern frontend stack: React 18, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind CSS 3.4.1, and 40+ pre-installed shadcn/ui components. The skill provides initialization and bundling scripts that produce a fully self-contained single HTML file suitable for use as a Claude artifact. Intended for artifacts requiring state management, routing, or component libraries — not for simple single-file HTML/JSX artifacts.

findings_summary.notes: Official Anthropic skill from anthropics/skills repository. Contains SKILL.md with full stack setup instructions, shell scripts (init-artifact.sh, bundle-artifact.sh), pre-bundled shadcn components archive, and Apache-2.0 LICENSE.txt. Verified present in anthropics/skills repo tree at skills/web-artifacts-builder/. Note: the subdirectory in the repo is 'web-artifacts-builder', not 'artifacts-builder'.

status_cleared.reason: SM cleanup: only full_pipeline pass is real pass. Needs re-verification.
